title: Postgres 数据库不可用
fault_phenomenon: 结果页访问异常或统计数据不可用，投票后结果也不更新。
public_case_info: This demo case targets a local or private Example Voting App deployment. Observable entries are the vote service at http://localhost:8080/ and the result service at http://localhost:8081/. Use the configured read-only operations tools to inspect service status, container status, logs, and end-to-end behavior.
